case_title: SELLICK, BRNET VS KNOX, SANUEL K.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED.
INFORMED PLTF. PLTF WITHDRAW REQUEST TO CHANGE NAME AFTER JUDGMENT.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 488558 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRNET AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX, SANUEL K.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRNET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOX, SANUEL K. $1,981.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,981.00 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,976.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 488558. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 5/13/89. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO CORRECT NAME OF DEFT IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF ON 5/12/99. SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNA- TURE.COMMISIONER WANTED IT TO BE PUT IN CALENDAR.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT SENT TO SAMUEL K. KNOX RETURNED TO SENDER
